KeysToEntries.DwarvenTraditions.Consumables.Brew.RamsH: A Clan Axbeard distillate, crafted to fuel long expeditions. A mug of this honey-kissed whiskey is a tribute to Mahal & journey for the spirit that will warm & revitalize, stoking your inner furnace & forging your troubles into something useful.
KeysToEntries.DwarvenTraditions.Consumables.Brew.Anvil: A rich, warming cocoa of melted chocolate and hot milk, a comfort beside the dwarf-forges.
KeysToEntries.DwarvenTraditions.Consumables.Brew.Brewe: A delicate tea of Niphredil, blessed by Elbereth, recalling the light and grace of Lórien.
Golden Elanor steeped with Elbereth's blessing, restoring vigor like the halls of Imladris.
KeysToEntries.DwarvenTraditions.Consumables.Brew.Ember: A rich amber-hued ale made from the finest mountain berries, slow-fermented over open flames, and egad in sealed stone-cast barrels nestled beside lava vets deep within the mountain. The recipe is safeguarded by the ancient Clan Firebeard.
